positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a mystical forest animal, like a howling celestial fox or an elegant owl, integrated into a cosmic floral wreath. The animal should have striking, clean silhouettes and intricate feather/fur detail. Use a neon pastel color palette (deep lavender, aqua blue, soft magenta, and electric teal) against a dark cosmic background. The style must be highly detailed digital artwork, reminiscent of tattoo flash combined with Art Nouveau aesthetics. Central composition, highly stylized, designed for maximum visibility on fabric, strong contrast, flat graphic areas mixed with soft gradients, full circle composition.
negative: photorealistic, photo, realism, blurry, grainy, amateur, bad anatomy, extra limbs, watermark, signature, text, logos, low contrast, jpeg artifacts, noisy, cropped, distorted, ugly, grayscale
